mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments (user_id, video_id, parent_id, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{videoId}, #{parentId}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT comments.id, comments.user_id, comments.video_id, comments.parent_id, comments.content, u.nickname, u.profile_image, comments.created_at, comments.updated_at, comments.deleted_at FROM comments JOIN users u ON u.id = comments.user_id WHERE comments.id = #{id} AND comments.deleted_at IS NULL

sql.if: AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM user_blocks WHERE blocker_id = #{viewerId} AND blocked_id = comments.user_id )

mapper.select:
SELECT comments.id, comments.user_id, comments.video_id, comments.parent_id, comments.content, u.nickname, u.profile_image, comments.created_at, comments.updated_at, comments.deleted_at FROM comments JOIN users u ON u.id = comments.user_id WHERE comments.video_id = #{videoId} AND comments.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY comments.created_at, comments.id LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comments WHERE video_id = #{videoId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE comments SET deleted_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
